# Scenario 13: Variant Selection (What to Do When the “Correct” Dependency Is Rejected)

## What This Scenario Demonstrates
This scenario demonstrates Gradle's attribute-based matching.

## Dependency Graph
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 4.4
graph LR
    Root["Project Root"] --> LibA["lib-a:1.0.0"]
    LibA -- variant --> LibA_Java11["lib-a:1.0.0 (Java 11)"]
```

### Gradle (Groovy DSL)

```{.groovy include="/demos/gradle-demo/scenario-13-variants/build.gradle" snippet="s13-deps"}
```

## Expected Intuition
"I get the right variant (Java 11, Debug, etc)."

## Actual Resolution Results
*   **Gradle**: Matches attributes.

## Classpath Reality
Correct variant.

## Why This Happens
Attributes.

## How Developers Commonly "Fix" This
Classifiers (Maven style).

## Safer Ways to Take Control
Use attributes.

## Signals to Watch For
"Cannot choose between..."

## How This Scales in Real Systems
The future of dependency management.

## Key Takeaway
Attributes > Classifiers.

## Related Scenarios
N/A
